title: Loading Backgrounds - Default Images
description: We have created a default resourcepack, with some images of the game, but it is also easily customizable just by changing the images.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_LoadingImages_header.webp) Loading Backgrounds is a mod that lets you fully customize your game’s loading screens with any images you like — whether from Minecraft or your own collection. We’ve included a default resource pack with in-game images, but you can easily replace them to create your own personalized loading experience. **[Requires the mod: Loading Backgrounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/loading-backgrounds)** ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds/BH_LB_banner1.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![screenshots 1](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_LoadingImages_screenshot1.webp) ![screenshots 2](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_LoadingImages_screenshot2.webp) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
